package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for body_binding_done_in_middleware_and_handler: Endpoints where middleware parses the body and the handler also owns body binding.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: info.
type Rule009NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule009NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule009NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario009Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule009NegativeService, input Rule009NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
